violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the establishment Certified Food Safety Manager. Employee certified in food safety to be registered with the RIDOH CFP as soon as possible. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the establishment Certified Food Safety Manager. Employee certified in food safety to be registered with the RIDOH CFP as soon as possible. Application for RIDOH CFP Certified Food Safety Manager License provided at time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the establishment Certified Food Safety Manager. Employee certified in food safety to be registered with the RIDOH CFP as soon as possible. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

All food items in the 3 Door Reach-In Cooler were observed held at 50-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods were voluntarily disposed of by the PIC at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The following equipment was observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The 3 Door Reach-In Cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 47 degrees Fahrenheit with all foods observed at 50-53 degrees Fahrenheit (Fan unit observed to be covered with ice). Use of the unit for storage of TCS Foods is to be discontinued until serviced/repaired. (Call for service was made same day.) - The small milk chest cooler was observed to have a gasket that was cracked and taped (in need of replacement) - The large milk chest cooler was observed to have a latch that is not maintaining a tightly closed/sealed door (in need of adjustment) Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The double doors to the outside, near the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets to the 2 door refrigerator were observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the chest cooler observed with an accumulation of ice buildup. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

The 3-bay sink, which is also used for food prep, is lacking an air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt/gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the ware-washing area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a storage rack and large boxes. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The three bay sink (which is also used for food prep) did not have an adequate air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024

At the time of inspection, the 3 Door Reach-in Freezer was observed to be out of service. Per the PIC, the 3 Door Freezer is in poor repair and not maintaining appropriate temperature for frozen food items. Unit is to be serviced/repaired or removed if not to be fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023
